results.name: MemoryHighway -- 10k message throughput
results.details: Published 10000 messages in 53ms; Throughput: 188835 msg/sec; Throughput >= 5000 msg/sec (full marks); All 10000 unique messages delivered to subscriber; Metrics totalMessages=10000; History retained 10000 messages

results.name: Concurrent tasks -- 50 simultaneous via WorkerPool
results.details: WorkerPool started with 4-8 workers; Submitted 50 tasks concurrently, completed in 547ms; All 50 results returned; All results verified correct; Zero task failures; Good completion time: 547ms; Metrics: processed=50, failed=0, workers=4; Pool stopped cleanly

results.name: BAPCodec -- Large payload encode/decode (100KB, 500KB, 1MB)
results.details: 100KB: encode=0.6ms, decode=0.8ms, ratio=0.745 (77321/103830 bytes); 100KB round-trip verified; 500KB: encode=6.0ms, decode=1.3ms, ratio=0.742 (384700/518486 bytes); 500KB round-trip verified; 1MB: encode=3.1ms, decode=2.0ms, ratio=0.741 (787021/1061687 bytes); 1MB round-trip verified; All payload sizes passed round-trip; Compression wins: overhead=0.807 (949/1176)

results.name: AgentExecutor -- Depth guard stops recursion at maxDepth:3
results.details: Executor configured with maxDepth=3; Execution completed: status=success, duration=552ms; Execution terminated gracefully (no crash or hang); Metrics: totalTasks=4, successful=4, failed=0; Task count 4 is within expected range for depth guard; Output shows depth handling evidence

results.name: EscalationManager -- Circuit breakers under rapid-fire load (20 agents)
results.details: Registered 20 worker agents + 1 manager; EscalationManager created with threshold=3; Fired 100 escalations: 40 succeeded, 60 circuit-broken; All 20 agents had their circuit breakers trip; Mix of successful and circuit-broken escalations (correct phased tripping); Stats: totalEscalations=60, circuitsBroken=20; All circuits reported broken in stats; After resetCircuit, agent can escalate again

results.name: WorkerPool -- 100-task spike with 50ms executor
results.details: WorkerPool started (min=2, max=10); 100 tasks completed in 2260ms; All 100 results returned; All 100 tasks ran through executor; Metrics: processed=100, failed=0, avgDuration=62.9ms; Zero failures; Completion time 2260ms is within acceptable range; Final worker count: 10; Pool scaled up beyond minimum (elasticity working); Pool stopped cleanly

results.name: RAGIndex -- 500 documents indexed, 20 queries with latency percentiles
results.details: RAGIndex initialized with TF-IDF embedder; Indexed 500 documents in 195ms (0.4ms/doc); Query latencies: p50=0.0ms, p95=1.9ms, p99=1.9ms, avg=0.2ms; Total results across 20 queries: 0 (avg 0.0/query); Excellent query performance (p95 < 100ms); WARNING: no results returned from any query; RAG metrics: totalItems=500, totalQueries=20, avgQueryMs=0.1; Index contains 500 items

results.name: AetherLinkServer -- 20 clients x 50 messages saturation test
results.details: Server started on port 29999; 20/20 clients connected; Sent 1000 messages in 2570ms; Server processed 1000 messages; Server processed >= 90% of messages (1000/1000); Throughput: ~389 msg/sec; Good throughput (>100 msg/sec); 20 agents still connected after saturation; Active channels: {"/stress/ch-0":5,"/stress/ch-1":5,"/stress/ch-2":5,"/stress/ch-3":5}; Server stopped cleanly
